info.title: Hermes Web UI API
info.description: BFF server API for Hermes Web UI — chat sessions, scheduled jobs, platform channels, model management, skills, memory, logs, file browser, group chat, and terminal.

tags.name: Proxy
tags.description: Gateway proxy to upstream Hermes API

get.description: Forwards unmatched /api/hermes/* requests to upstream Hermes gateway. Supports all upstream endpoints.

post.description: Forwards unmatched /api/hermes/* requests to upstream Hermes gateway. Supports all upstream endpoints.

put.description: Forwards unmatched /api/hermes/* requests to upstream Hermes gateway. Supports all upstream endpoints.

delete.description: Forwards unmatched /api/hermes/* requests to upstream Hermes gateway. Supports all upstream endpoints.

get.summary: Proxy to upstream Hermes v1 API
get.description: Forwards /v1/* requests to upstream Hermes gateway. Supports all upstream v1 endpoints.

post.summary: Proxy to upstream Hermes v1 API
post.description: Forwards /v1/* requests to upstream Hermes gateway. Supports all upstream v1 endpoints.

get.description: Establish a WebSocket connection for interactive terminal access. Uses the `ws` or `wss` protocol with `?token=` for authentication.
Stream chat events using Server-Sent Events (SSE). Authentication via `?token=` query parameter.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token
